General.Name: Baguio Green Group Ltd
General.Description: Baguio Green Group Limited, an investment holding company, provides environmental and related services in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and Southeast Asia. It operates in four segments: Cleaning Services Business, Landscaping Services Business, Pest Management Business, and Waste Management and Recycling Business. The company offers integrated environmental services, including cleaning services, waste management and collection, horticulture and landscaping, and pest control; recycling services for plastic bottles, glass bottles, yard waste, and animal waste; green technology products comprising smart waste management and IoT solutions; and green products, such as organic planting materials, green sand bags, and recycled raw materials. It also provides smart recycling machines, smart food waste recycling machines, smart balances, and people counting systems; big data platforms and artificial intelligence solutions; paper recycling services; automobile repair services; services related to bioconversion of organic waste; and plant nursing services. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong. Baguio Green Group Limited is a subsidiary of Baguio Green (Holding) Limited.
General.Address: Dragon Industrial Building, Lai Chi Kok, Hong Kong
